en: ♪ Señoras y señores ♪ ♪ Buenas tardes, buenas noches ♪
♪ Buenas tardes, buenas noches ♪ ♪ Señoritas y señores ♪
♪ To be here with you tonight ♪ ♪ Brings me joy, qué alegría! ♪
♪ For this music is my language ♪
♪ For this music is my language ♪ [laughing] ♪ And the world es mi familia ♪
[Miguel, de la Cruz] ♪ For this music is my language ♪
♪ And the world es mi familia ♪ ♪ For this music is my language-- ♪
